purpose: Load the pending-direct-invite marker Set once per member-list load and thread it to MemberList; add the onRemoveMember handler (reusing the existing cancelPendingInvitation MLS-remove wrapper, same as onCancelInvite); after either handler resolves (including both raceDetected short-circuits), gate a post-hoc 'pubkey no longer in the tree' check that runs the per-member profile purge (S2) and the marker clear (S1) exactly when the pubkey is confirmed gone -- never when it is still a member.

public_api.name: computeStillMember
public_api.description: Case-insensitive membership test against a freshly-read live member list. Fail-closed toward 'still a member' (returns true) when liveMembers is undefined (unreadable) -- an ambiguous read must never trigger a purge/clear.

public_api.name: runPostRemovalCleanup
public_api.signature: (params: { groupId: string; pubkey: string; stillMember: boolean; deleteMemberProfile: (groupId: string, pubkey: string) => Promise<void>; clearPendingDirectInvite: (groupId: string, pubkey: string) => Promise<void>; }) => Promise<void>
public_api.description: AC-PURGE-2/3/4, AC-MARKER-7/8 gate: no-ops when stillMember is true; otherwise calls deleteMemberProfile and clearPendingDirectInvite concurrently, swallowing (and logging) any purge/clear failure so a best-effort cleanup step never breaks the caller's toast flow.

public_api.name: performGroupMemberRemoval
public_api.signature: (params: { groupId: string; pubkey: string; sendAnnouncement?: (content: string) => Promise<void>; cancelPendingInvitation: (groupId: string, pubkey: string, sendAnnouncement?: (content: string) => Promise<void>) => Promise<CancelPendingInvitationResult>; getLiveMemberPubkeys: (groupId: string) => Promise<string[] | undefined>; deleteMemberProfile: (groupId: string, pubkey: string) => Promise<void>; clearPendingDirectInvite: (groupId: string, pubkey: string) => Promise<void>; }) => Promise<CancelPendingInvitationResult>
public_api.description: AC-REMOVE-1's shared removal helper: calls cancelPendingInvitation, independently re-reads live tree membership via getLiveMemberPubkeys (never the pre-removal group.memberPubkeys closure), runs runPostRemovalCleanup, and returns the raw result so callers can render their own toast copy. Both onCancelInvite and onRemoveMember call this one function -- never two divergent MLS-remove code paths.

public_api.name: classifyRemovalResult
public_api.signature: (result: { ok: boolean; raceDetected?: boolean; announcementError?: string }) => 'raceNotice' | 'announcementWarning' | 'success' | 'error'
public_api.description: Pure toast-routing decision shared by onCancelInvite and onRemoveMember; only the copy keys used for 'success'/'error' differ between the two callers (cancelInvite* vs removeMember*), the race/announcement branches reuse the same shared copy.

owned_data: pendingInviteMarkers React state (Set<string>, in-memory only, reloaded once per member-list load)
dependencies_allowed: MarmotContext (useMarmot(): getPendingDirectInvites, cancelPendingInvitation, getLiveMemberPubkeys -- all pre-existing/S5 context methods, consumed as-is)
groupStorage.ts (deleteMemberProfile -- S2's exported storage function, imported directly since no context wrapper exists)
pendingDirectInviteStorage.ts (clearPendingDirectInvite -- S1's exported storage function, imported directly since no context wrapper exists)
MemberList (new pendingInviteMarkers / onRemoveMember props threaded through; consuming/rendering logic is S10's)
i18n (copy.groups.removeMember{Success,Error} -- S6's keys; copy.groups.cancelInvite{RaceNotice,AnnouncementWarning} reused for both handlers)
dependencies_forbidden: cancelInvitationImpl.ts internals (direct import) -- only the MarmotContext.cancelPendingInvitation wrapper is consumed
pendingDirectInviteStorage.ts's markerKey/internal store object -- only the exported clearPendingDirectInvite function is consumed
groupStorage.ts's internal stores -- only the exported deleteMemberProfile function is consumed
